holdings.infoBox: ISRA is an equity ETF with a total of 81 individual holdings. The top holdings are Teva Pharmaceutical Industries stock at 10.70%, Bank Leumi le-Israel B.M. at 8.25%, Bank Hapoalim B.M. at 7.14%, Elbit Systems at 6.48%, and Tower Semiconductor at 5.81%.

overview.description: The VanEck Israel ETF (ISRA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BlueStar Israel Global index. The fund tracks a cap-weighted, committee-reviewed index of Israeli and Israeli-linked companies. ISRA was launched on Jun 25, 2013 and is issued by VanEck.
